raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Legislature passed legislation to establish a statewide eviction defense program.",
    "Assembly Bill (AB) 1487 aims to create a new 'Homelessness Prevention Fund' to support education, outreach, and direct legal services.",
    "Preventing evictions is key to addressing California’s homelessness crisis.",
    "An estimated 13.2 million adults are behind on rent payments due to the pandemic.",
    "Nearly 50% of homeless adults list evictions or rent-related issues as a contributor to their homelessness.",
    "Tenants are almost always unrepresented in eviction-related legal proceedings.",
    "Those who secure legal counsel in eviction proceedings are able to avoid disruptive displacement 95% of the time.",
    "AB 1487 follows growing national momentum for eviction defense programs.",
    "The legal system primarily protects property owners and people with wealth, leaving low-income tenants vulnerable.",
    "The lack of legal representation for tenants leads to increased displacement and housing insecurity.",
    "Expanding and strengthening California's legal aid network is essential to keep families safe and in their homes.",
    "Estimates suggest that more than 2 million Californians were behind on rent in July, with over 73% of them being people of color."
  ]
}
```
